description: Verso: Record of the donation of one quarter of a compound by Sitt al-Naẓar bt. Ḥalfon to the qodesh. Dating: ca. 1161 CE. She also donates one-sixth of the same compound to Faḍāʾil b. ʿAwāʿiḍ Ibn al-Katnānī, a brother or some other relative of hers, on the condition that she herself shall have the usufruct of that part during her lifetime. After her death it will go to him, to his son, and to his mother Sitt al-Dār. After that, this part also will pass into the possession of the qodesh. Written by the judge Mevorakh b. Natan on the verso of an engagement contract dated 29 November 1161 CE. (Gil, Documents, pp. 299 #66.) EMS
description_he: תרומה: סיתת-אל-נזאר בת חלפון מעניקה רבע חצר להקדש; ושישית לאחיה פדאאיל בתנאי שהיא תהנה ממנו בחייה. לאחר מותה יעבור לו ולבנו ואמו, ואחר כך להקדש. בכתב השופט מבורך בן נתן, כ-1161.
